Live execution failed (recorded at runtime): Fracture side not determined. Ensure step 13 (cutWithRoi) completed.
A correction that succeeded at runtime (use as evidence for the template fix, adapting it to template conventions):
import slicer

# Get the module widget to read the fractured side from the sideComboBox
moduleWidget = slicer.util.getModuleWidget('OrbitalFractureReconstruction')
if moduleWidget is None:
    raise RuntimeError("OrbitalFractureReconstruction module widget not found. Ensure the module was entered.")

# sideComboBox index 0 = "Red box" (patient-right) -> side "right"
# sideComboBox index 1 = "Blue box" (patient-left) -> side "left"
side = "right" if moduleWidget.sideComboBox.currentIndex == 0 else "left"
print(f"[OrbitalFractureReconstruction] Fractured side determined from widget: {side}")

# Access the logic instance
try:
    logic = _orbitalfracturereconstruction_logic
except NameError:
    from OrbitalFractureReconstruction import OrbitalFractureReconstructionLogic
    logic = OrbitalFractureReconstructionLogic()
    _orbitalfracturereconstruction_logic = logic

# segmentOrbits() accepts a side parameter and sets self._side internally
logic.segmentOrbits(side)
print(f"[OrbitalFractureReconstruction] Step 14: Both orbits segmented (side={side}).")
